markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and align on the proposed content strategy for Witness AI.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Approved:** The 6-cluster content strategy was approved, with a 5-article/week cadence to build a sustainable organic pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [**KPIs Need Definition:** The current KPIs are too "fluffy"; GrowthX will provide benchmarks from similar clients to help define concrete, measurable success metrics for the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1964.0)
  - [**Critical Terminology Correction:** The term "behavioral risk" is not to be used externally. The correct messaging is "classify purpose and intent" to avoid negative perceptions of employee monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
  - [**Persona Alignment is Next:** The content calendar will map articles to specific personas (e.g., CISO, security architect), but Sharat must first review and finalize the persona document.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)

## Topics

### Current State & Opportunity

  - **Pipeline Driver:** Events are the primary driver; organic traffic is the \#2 source but lacks a dedicated content engine.
  - [**Website Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [Traffic is concentrated on the homepage and press releases.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [Most content ranks on Page 2, with low CTR on high-volume "governance" topics.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [Specific topics like "AI model collapse" perform well.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - \~1/3 of blog posts received \<5 clicks in the last 3 months, creating a future refresh opportunity.
  - [**Goal:** Build a sustainable content engine to drive qualified traffic and brand awareness, targeting both Google SEO and LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

### Proposed Content Strategy

  - [GrowthX proposed 6 content clusters to build authority around the emerging theme of "AI risk management."](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [**1. Agentic AI Security:**](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [**Focus:** Educating buyers on why traditional keyword-based DLP fails with modern AI prompts, positioning Witness AI's intent-based classification as the superior alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Note:** This cluster will be expanded to include general "AI security" topics.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [**2. AI Governance, Compliance & Shadow AI:**](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
      - [**Focus:** Building authority in governance by targeting specific, high-intent keywords (e.g., "how to enforce AI policies") to support the "Observe & Control" pillars and attract "Trust & Compliance" buyers.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [**3. Securing AI Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [**Focus:** Capturing high-intent searches from users of specific AI tools (e.g., "Google Gemini security") to educate them on risks and position Witness AI as the solution.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [**4. AI Risk by Industry:**](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
      - [**Subcluster A (FinServ/Healthcare):** Leans on compliance and governance as the entry point.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [**Subcluster B (Airlines/Retail/Hospitality):** Focuses on securing chatbots and preventing hallucinations.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [**5. Product Comparisons & Listicles:**](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
      - [**Focus:** Bottom-of-funnel content targeting buyers actively evaluating solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Crucial for SEO and for "training" LLMs on Witness AI's unique technical capabilities, preventing competitors from controlling the narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)

### Content Execution & Alignment

  - [**Persona Mapping:**](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
      - [Sharat requested that the content calendar map articles to specific personas (CISO, security architect) to ensure relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
      - [**Action:** Sharat will review the existing persona document to finalize the definitions before the calendar is built.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Blog Placement:**](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
      - [Witness AI has two blogs: a main blog and an "SEO/learning" section.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will work with Witness AI to determine the optimal placement for each article type.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [**Content Grounding:**](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
      - [GrowthX's AI tools are explicitly grounded in Witness AI's "message house" and other internal documents to ensure brand consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)
      - [**Action:** Stephanie will share the new "business value" document to further inform content.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)

### Defining Success & ROI

  - [Stephanie flagged the current KPIs as too "fluffy" and requested more concrete, measurable metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1964.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will provide performance benchmarks (e.g., % uplift) from similar past engagements to help define success.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [**8-week sprint:** Focus on publishing \~20 articles and establishing leading indicators (indexing, initial traffic).](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [**Lagging indicators:** Significant organic traffic growth typically takes 6–8 weeks post-publication to ramp up.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=2073.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sharat:** Review the persona document to finalize definitions.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Stephanie:** Share the new "business value" document with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=2367.0)
      - [Provide performance benchmarks from similar client engagements.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
      - [Deliver a "calibration article" (a rewrite of an existing post) next week for Sharat's review.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=2379.0)
      - [Grant Witness AI team access to the Airtable content calendar next week.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [**All:** Reschedule next Thursday's meeting to either Friday or Monday due to the Witness AI Sales Kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/mZUy62QwwANEtsVRRJcG9kJkxvMxMBea?tab=summary&timestamp=2495.0)
